productDisplayName: Puma Men's Drift Cat Black Shoe
description: This contemporary version of the original Drift cat sneaker has a subtle but trendy look that will always stay till the last.Upper Low-profile design made for the avid motorsport enthusiast Premium leather upper for longer wear Low-profile cupsole and a functional stabilizer on both sides of the foot Bold, contrasting formstrip logo outline Asymmetrical lace-up system that alleviates pressure points Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection Outsole Rubber outsole for enhanced traction Outsole embedded onto upper as heel cup for superior shock absorption and enhanced durability
